title: Core Models Path
description: Build fluency in Core Models inside Computer Vision by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: UNet
steps.summary: UNet belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Core Models. It sits inside Computer Vision / Core Models. Compare it with UNet++ and UNet 3+. It opens into UNet++ and UNet 3+.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: UNet++
steps.summary: UNet++ belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Core Models. It sits inside Computer Vision / Core Models. Start after UNet and R(2+1)D. It opens into Attention-UNet-Plus.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: UNet 3+
steps.summary: UNet 3+ belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Core Models. It sits inside Computer Vision / Core Models. Start after UNet and R(2+1)D. It opens into Attention-UNet-Plus.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: PV-RCNN++
steps.summary: PV-RCNN++ belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Core Models. It sits inside Computer Vision / Core Models. Start after PV-RCNN and R(2+1)D.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Pix2Pix-UNet
steps.summary: Pix2Pix-UNet belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Core Models. It sits inside Computer Vision / Core Models. Start after UNet and Pix2Pix.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: PV-RCNN
steps.summary: PV-RCNN belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Core Models. It sits inside Computer Vision / Core Models. Compare it with PV-RCNN++ and Mask RCNN. It opens into PV-RCNN++.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: IRN-UNet
steps.summary: IRN-UNet belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Core Models. It sits inside Computer Vision / Core Models. Start after UNet.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Mask RCNN
steps.summary: Mask RCNN belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Core Models. It sits inside Computer Vision / Core Models. Compare it with PV-RCNN and Libra RCNN. It opens into Cascade-Mask-RCNN-Swin.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
